prompt:
An Arduino Uno–style microcontroller board lies on a wooden desk, its blue PCB, USB connector, power jack, and rows of female headers clearly visible. A USB cable is plugged into the board and leads off frame toward a laptop in the background, and a few jumper wires and a small breadboard sit nearby, hinting at an in-progress beginner electronics project. The silkscreen area uses abstract shapes instead of readable text to avoid specific branding.

Near-future solarpunk electronics workbench aesthetic with warm lighting, a small plant, and maybe a tiny solar panel visible at the edge of the frame. Photorealistic 512×512 rendering, no brand logos or legible labels. The composition should immediately read as a beginner-friendly Arduino Uno–style board as an inventory item.
